name: polymarket_analysis
description: Deep event analysis for Polymarket. Uses real-time search to compare market odds with real-world news and data. Provides a concise alpha thesis, mispricing score (0-100), and a clear Buy/Avoid verdict. Ideal for prediction market traders looking for a data-driven edge.

event_name.description: The Polymarket event or topic (e.g. 'Will ETH hit $5k in March?')

current_odds.description: The current market price/odds for the 'Yes' outcome (e.g. '20%' or '$0.20')

market_url.description: Optional: Link to the specific Polymarket event
